title: MODPACK BY PHANTOM
description: A fast-paced SMP and PvP-focused Minecraft modpack with performance boosts, combat enhancements, and multiplayer-friendly features for competitive gameplay.
body:
"MODPACK BY PHANTOM is built for players who love the thrill of survival multiplayer and intense PvP battles. This pack combines performance optimizations with balanced combat mods, making it perfect for both casual SMP communities and competitive PvP arenas.

✨ Features:

⚡ Lag-Free Performance – Optimized for smoother gameplay, even during large multiplayer fights.

⚔️ PvP Enhancements – Combat-focused mods designed for fair, exciting battles.

🌍 SMP Ready – Perfectly balanced for survival multiplayer worlds and long-term server play.

🛠️ Quality-of-Life Improvements – Helpful tweaks that make survival and combat more enjoyable.

🎨 Clean Visuals – Improved graphics and HUD clarity for better PvP awareness.

Whether you’re grinding in survival with friends, raiding bases, or dueling in PvP, this modpack delivers a stable, action-packed experience tailored for SMP communities."
